title: Motifity's GUI (Simple GUI)
description: Simple Minecraft GUI resource pack 1.21.x and 1.20.2-1.20.6! (Support 3 mods!)
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3708e4b1f440a156841deb4ac0e5eb63d545674f_0.webp)
- Thanks for 100 downloads (～￣▽￣)～


Simple Minecraft GUI resource pack 1.21.x and 1.20.2-1.20.6 (Weighs 3MB) 

# About resource pack
My first resource pack :3

This resource pack adds: Dark theme, new UI, improves the GUI a bit.

# What is it for? 
If you want to make your UI simpler, that resource pack is perfect for it! 

# Screenshot
![Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b73da760cb16612c5939080d126625e13d7e6d4_0.webp)

# How to install? 
Go to the folder Minecraft, find "resourcepacks" and upload my resource pack there. 

# Plans
- Import this Resource pack for 1.21.11 (Completed!)
 
- Import this Resource pack for 1.20-1.20.1 (Impossible)

# Supported mod list
- Simple Voice Chat https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat/versions
- Mod menu https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu/versions
- Sodium https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium/versions

# Creator
Motifity
